description: Invitation from the association "ha-Fāmt Keter Torah" for attending the tefillin ceremony of fifteen students – 5 March 1939CE – Bassatine Cemetery – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 92) – in Hebrew (recto) and French (verso). (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 45). MCD.
